localTips.tip.rome.1.title: Pickpockets in crowded areas
localTips.tip.rome.1.description: Keep your phone and wallet secure in public transport.

localTips.tip.tokyo.1.description: Keep conversations low and follow platform lines.

survivalTips.tip.mountain.1.title: Layering works

survivalTips.tip.beach.1.title: Sun protection

airline.title: Regras da companhia aérea
airline.note.liquids: Liquids may be restricted. Always verify current rules.
airline.note.lowCost: Low cost airlines may have stricter cabin limits.
allowedItems.title: Itens permitidos
allowedItems.note.liquids: Liquids are usually limited in cabin luggage.
allowedItems.note.battery: Spare batteries are usually restricted in checked luggage.
adapters.reco.needAdapter: You will likely need an adapter. Consider a universal adapter.
adapters.reco.maybeUniversal: A universal adapter may be enough depending on your devices.
adapters.reco.checkVoltage: Check device voltage compatibility. Consider a converter if needed.
